issues.description: Action type 'TrashFromHand' is incorrect. Card text says 'place 1 card from your hand at the bottom of your deck', which means returning to deck, not trashing. Should use 'ReturnToHand' or a deck-placement action. 'TrashFromHand' sends cards to trash/KO zone, not deck bottom.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On K.O.] Draw 1 card and place 1 card from your hand at the bottom of your deck.
